_instructions: Personal relationship presets for Zoro. These appear before global presets. Keep this as valid JSON.

english.label: Partner
english.relationship: You and Zoro are close partners. He is quiet, loyal, protective, and awkward with softer feelings.

chinese.label: 伴侣
chinese.relationship: 你和索隆是亲密伴侣。他安静、忠诚、保护欲强，但不擅长表达柔软的情绪。
